interactions: m_c and r_c watch the stars together.
m_c tells r_c a story about StarClan.
r_c admires m_c's strong beliefs.
m_c had a scary nightmare about the Dark Forest.
m_c has been seeing scary shadows.
m_c prayed for some rain to water the herbs, and it came!
m_c thanks StarClan for leading {PRONOUN/m_c/object} towards a brand new herb patch.
m_c hopes StarClan is proud of {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} work.
m_c thanks StarClan for {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} meal.
m_c gazes up at the stars, trying to guess which ones are {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} fallen Clanmates.
m_c thinks about StarClan.
m_c finds a strangely sparkly feather in {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} nest and wonders if it's a sign.
m_c is feeling especially spiritual today.
m_c and r_c have a heated argument about faith. In the end, m_c is able to slightly sway r_c away from StarClan.
m_c tells r_c about {PRONOUN/m_c/poss} disdain for StarClan.
m_c has a dream about the Dark Forest after speaking with r_c.
r_c tries to warn m_c about the dangers of the Dark Forest, but the idea just intrigues {PRONOUN/m_c/object}.
m_c's faith in StarClan starts to wane when r_c doesn't answer {PRONOUN/m_c/object}.
m_c gets into a fight with r_c and starts wondering if StarClan really is as kind as {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} thought.
m_c has a near-death experience and comes out of it with a whole new perspective on life.
While r_c thanks StarClan for {PRONOUN/r_c/poss} meal, m_c begrudgingly thanks {PRONOUN/m_c/self} for being the one to catch it.
r_c asks m_c what {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} {VERB/m_c/think/thinks} of StarClan. m_c simply responds that {PRONOUN/m_c/subject} {VERB/m_c/don't/doesn't}.
